raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Settle the room","name":"Before we get specific, what would be useful to talk through today?","description":"A safe opener that lets James set the agenda and signal what matters most.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Rituals change","name":"I've noticed you've been less present in some team rituals since then — what's changed for you?","description":"Uses an observable shift to invite his account without assuming the cause.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"What feels different","name":"What feels different in your week-to-week work since the promotion decision?","description":"Surfaces practical changes in rhythm, ownership, or attention after the decision.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision meaning","name":"What did you take away from the conversation about the promotion decision?","description":"Finds out what feedback he actually heard and believed, without assuming he received it clearly.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Path forward","name":"What path forward feels real to you from here?","description":"Tests whether he sees a concrete route ahead or is still waiting for one to emerge.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring fit","name":"How is the mentoring program fitting into your core product work right now?","description":"Checks whether mentoring is healthy stretch or crowding out the work that should define his role.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Time allocation","name":"What are you saying yes to that you would not have chosen six months ago?","description":"Reveals whether his energy is shifting toward lower-stakes or safer work.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback usefulness","name":"What feedback from that decision has actually been useful to you?","description":"Surfaces whether the feedback landed as actionable guidance or stayed vague.","purpose":"competency","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Support needed","name":"What would help this feel more workable over the next couple of weeks?","description":"Closes by moving toward concrete support or adjustments without opening a new thread.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
